name: agent-builder
description: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses with playbooks and an architecture catalog

interface.shortDescription: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses with playbooks and an architecture catalog
interface.longDescription: Cross-LLM skill for designing, evaluating, and improving agentic harnesses. Methodology playbooks (how to decide) plus an empirical catalog (what exists) covering architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, lab patterns, and local/open-source model agents.
